# Navik OÜ

> Last verified: April 2026

> Navik OÜ is an Estonian IT consulting and web development company based in Tallinn. We provide independent IT decision audits, fractional CIO services, AI automation consulting, and affordable AI-powered website development for small businesses. Founded by Veiko-Peeter Kargu. Registry code: 17454389.

## Täisversioon / Full version

Detailed overview with all services, pricing, and background: [llms-full.txt](https://navik.ee/llms-full.txt)

## What we do

Navik OÜ helps Estonian SMEs (manufacturing, logistics, retail) avoid costly IT mistakes and build professional web presence. We are 100% on the client's side — we don't sell software or licenses.

## Services

- **IT Decision Audit / Vale IT-otsuse Audit** (€2,500 fixed): 2-week independent analysis before purchasing ERP, CRM, or WMS. Result: clear recommendation — buy, don't buy, or wait. Money-back guarantee.
- **Fractional CIO / Sõltumatu Digijuht**: Part-time IT strategy management for 20-200 employee companies. Same CIO-level expertise at a fraction of the cost.
- **AI & Automation / Praktiline AI**: Automating routine manual processes (Excel, email, reporting) with practical, affordable AI tools. Half-day team workshops available.
- **Website Development / Kodulehtede loomine** (from €100): Professional one-page websites built with AI tools in 1-2 business days. Additional pages €70 each. Changes €40/hour. Mobile-friendly, SEO-optimized, hosted on client's own domain. No monthly fees, no lock-in. Portfolio: rsauto24.ee, kargu.ee, kargu.ee/purjereisid, navik.ee, kargu.ee/okas

## Founder

Veiko-Peeter Kargu has sat on every side of the IT negotiation table:
- As an entrepreneur: scaled Klick Estonia from 0 to 30 stores
- As a demanding enterprise buyer: Estonian Railways (AS Eesti Raudtee) IT procurement
- As an ERP vendor: BCS Itera — software sales and implementation

First 30-minute consultation is free. Book: https://navik.ee/kontakt/

- April 2026: Launched website development service (Veebitehas) — professional websites from €100
- April 2026: Portfolio expanded with RS Auto 24 (rsauto24.ee) and 4 other completed projects
- 2026: Active in IT audit, fractional CIO, and AI consulting for Estonian SMEs
